name: MLX (Apple Silicon)
description: MLX provider for local LLM inference on Apple Silicon via mlx_lm.server's OpenAI-compatible API.

MLX_BASE_URL.label: Base URL
MLX_BASE_URL.help: Base URL for the mlx-lm OpenAI-compatible server.

MLX_API_KEY.label: API Key
MLX_API_KEY.help: Optional bearer token. mlx-lm.server does not require one by default.

MLX_SMALL_MODEL.label: Small Model
MLX_SMALL_MODEL.help: Identifier of the small-sized MLX model to use for text generation.

MLX_LARGE_MODEL.label: Large Model
MLX_LARGE_MODEL.help: Identifier of the large-sized MLX model to use for text generation.

MLX_EMBEDDING_MODEL.label: Embedding Model
MLX_EMBEDDING_MODEL.help: Identifier of the MLX model used to generate text embeddings, when embeddings are served by the same mlx-lm instance.

MLX_AUTO_DETECT.label: Auto Detect
MLX_AUTO_DETECT.help: When true, the plugin probes mlx_lm.server on init and logs a clear warning if it is not reachable.
